parameters.query:
-- Check if emergency is active (don't recover during emergency)
SELECT is_active FROM emergency_state WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY activated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id AS teaser_id, t.ad_id, t.state, t.state_changed_at, t.state_reason,
       t.recovery_attempts, t.pause_count, t.bid, t.escalation_level,
       gp.min_bid, gp.max_bid, gp.max_cpl, gp.country_code,
       EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - t.state_changed_at)) / 3600 AS hours_in_state
FROM teasers t
LEFT JOIN geo_payouts gp ON gp.country_code = (
  SELECT country_code FROM geo_payouts LIMIT 1
)
WHERE t.state IN ('paused_low_ctr', 'paused_high_cpl', 'paused_budget', 'paused_anomaly', 'stopped', 'recovery_queue')
  AND t.recovery_attempts < 3
  AND t.ad_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY t.state_changed_at ASC

SELECT ad_id, anomaly_type, severity, resolved, detected_at
FROM anomalies
WHERE resolved = FALSE
  AND detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
ORDER BY ad_id, detected_at DESC

-- Update teaser state
UPDATE teasers SET
  state = '{{ $json.new_state }}',
  state_changed_at = NOW(),
  state_reason = '{{ $json.reason.replace(/'/g, "''").slice(0, 200) }}',
  recovery_attempts = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.action }}' = 'RECOVER' THEN recovery_attempts + 1 ELSE recovery_attempts END,
  escalation_level = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.action }}' = 'RECOVER' THEN 0 ELSE escalation_level END,
  escalation_failures = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.action }}' = 'RECOVER' THEN 0 ELSE escalation_failures END,
  bid = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.action }}' = 'RECOVER' THEN {{ $json.new_bid }} ELSE bid END,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE ad_id = {{ $json.ad_id }};

-- Log state transition
INSERT INTO teaser_state_log (teaser_id, ad_id, old_state, new_state, reason, triggered_by)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.teaser_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ad_id }},
  '{{ $json.old_state }}',
  '{{ $json.new_state }}',
  '{{ $json.reason.replace(/'/g, "''").slice(0, 200) }}',
  'recovery_engine'
);
